name: Baked Whitefish
recipeIngredient: 8 7 oz. skinless boneless cod fillets or other white fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fish lightly.
2. Dredge each portion of fish through the flour, ensuring it is fully covered. Shake off any excess flour.
3. Place half a cup of mayonnaise on each fillet and spread evenly.
4. Sprinkle with lemon pepper seasoning and parsley flakes.
5. Place the seasoned fillets in a baking pan and pour water around them (the water helps keep the fish moist while baking).
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned. Serves 8.
